items.title: [Highlight] Cason Wallace soars up high and somehow blocks the tip in attempt by Luke Kornet at the basket (with replays). Kornet wants a goaltending. Kornet is called for the foul.
items.author: MrBuckBuck

items.title: Just another reminder that Cason Wallace led the league in steals. You can't dribble haphazardly around him. Dylan Harper had to find out.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: Just another reminder that Cason Wallace led the league in steals. You can't dribble haphazardly around him. Dylan Harper had to find out.

items.title: It's really incredible how good Cason Wallace is at just ripping the ball out of dudes' hands.
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: It's really incredible how good Cason Wallace is at just ripping the ball out of dudes' hands.

items.title: OKC wants to move Shai Gilgeous-Alexander off ball. Spurs working to pressure the ball, working to be physical off ball. SGA wants the Vassell matchup, you give the switch, you help on the drive. You do all that you're supposed to do and Cason Wallace gets this drive and finish.
items.author: Steve Jones
items.body_excerpt: OKC wants to move Shai Gilgeous-Alexander off ball. Spurs working to pressure the ball, working to be physical off ball. SGA wants the Vassell matchup, you give the switch, you help on the drive. You do all that you're supposed to do and Cason Wallace gets this drive and finish.

items.title: Cason Wallace help defense steals the ball from Keldon Johnson then gives KJ a bump. When Victor Wembanyama comes in for the steal attempt, he gets a bump too!
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt: Cason Wallace help defense steals the ball from Keldon Johnson then gives KJ a bump. When Victor Wembanyama comes in for the steal attempt, he gets a bump too!
